Description: This component is a surface-mount, low-profile tactile switch designed for PCB mounting. It functions as a momentary, normally-open (NO) push-button switch, where pressing the button completes an electrical circuit between its two terminals. It features a metal dome (弹片) for tactile feedback, a dust-proof membrane, and is rated for low-current signal or power applications.

Functions.FunctionDescription: One electrical terminal of the switch.
The other electrical terminal of the switch.
